column1: # Official MCAT content outline (AAMC), used by verify/coverage_map.py to
# measure how much of the exam the built-in bank covers (brief §7c / §4 "% of
# the exam covered"). One row per official *content category*.
# Columns: section_code <TAB> section_name <TAB> category_code <TAB> category_name <TAB> keywords
# keywords are comma-separated terms used to match bank cards to the category.
# CARS (section 4) is a skills section with no content categories, so it is
# listed once and excluded from content-coverage math (documented in the report).
